programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E11 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E231
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: Huling Akyat Sa Torre[Live]
programme.desc: Presented by ABS-CBN News Documentaries, in celebration of ABS-CBN's 80th founding anniversary, “Huling Akyat sa Torre” (Last Ascent Up the Tower) is a 2026 documentary that zooms in on a structure that has come to symbolize the company -the Millennium Tower. Beyond its link to the history, rise, and trials of “the Philippines' largest network”, the tower is seen from the eyes of the men who have touched and climbed its heights. Journalist Anjo Bagaoisan interviews current and former engineers and technicians of their memories working with the tower that have made their mark in nearly 40 years of Philippine history. The documentary is narrated by veteran journalist and ABS-CBN News anchor Tony Velasquez.

Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: E3 - No Beads, No Business
programme.desc: Raj's dream of turning the camp store into something special is tested.

programme.title: E9 - Hello Dolly
programme.desc: Edward will stop at nothing to prevent the Jellies from discovering he has a doll.

programme.title: E11 - The Battle Of Pimpleback Mountain
programme.desc: The Jellies rip a hole in Lumpus' prized tent and will do anything to keep Lumpus from discovering the secret.

programme.title: E12 - Dead Bean Drop
programme.desc: When the Jellies discover Slinkman used to be an amazing stuntman, they do all they can to restore him to his former glory.

programme.title: E20 - Tomato Paste
programme.desc: Edward 'earns' enough badges to become the first camper ever to graduate from Camp Kidney--but does he want to go?

programme.title: E25 - Hole In The Story
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney seek the advice of Grandpa Squirrel to get out of a dangerous dare.

programme.title: E20 - Hornbill And Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: Mr. Hornbill arrives at school today with an obnoxious, loudmouthed oxpecker bird sitting on his horn. When the bird insults Jake, he and the gang scheme to rid Hornbill of the pest at any cost.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: E20 - Hornbill And Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: Mr. Hornbill arrives at school today with an obnoxious, loudmouthed oxpecker bird sitting on his horn. When the bird insults Jake, he and the gang scheme to rid Hornbill of the pest at any cost.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: In this new action-packed chapter the now-reformed Bad Guys are forced to pull one last heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals: The Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: In this new action-packed chapter the now-reformed Bad Guys are forced to pull one last heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals: The Bad Girls.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: Ten months after the murder of Yan (Tony Leung), Ming (Andy Lau) is relegated to the backseat of mundane office work, pending internal investigation. Exhausted mentally and physically, Ming is running on empty, but he is convinced that he can reverse his fortune in no time. Meanwhile, a new star has emerged in the police force. Hardly forty years old, Wing (Leon Lai) has already risen to the top echelon thanks to his illustrious track record...

programme.title: As It Burns
programme.desc: An explosion takes place in an apartment late at night, detective Ngai Wan arrives for the investigation and a charred woman body found on spot, her name is Yin Ching. Ching is getting married with Ng Lam who grew up in a wealthy family. Though it seems to be an accident, Wan feels that something is unusual. Wan first investigate the background of Ching and finds that her mother was died in a fire accident fifteen years ago also. Before that, Ching and her mother were in a difficult relationship, Lo Chi Fung was the only person Ching could talk to. They both grew up in Pak Sin Town and disappeared together after the accident happened. Wan perseveres in the investigation but the case just like falling into the mist as everyone related to Ching are all hiding some secrets. The turning point comes out until Lo Chi Fung and his girlfriend Lam Yam show up. The two fatal cases are crossing fifteen years, everyone can be suspected. The truth is far beyond everyone's imagination behi

programme.title: Making of Cesium Fallout
programme.desc: Directed by Anthony Pun, 'Cesium Fallout' is the first Hong Kong's historic first radiation disaster blockbuster that has won 5 nominations at the 43rd Hong Kong Film Awards. This documentary has recorded every little bits of behind-the-scene as well as the sharing from Anthony Pun, the cast and the production crew.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: The world is under attack from an “Love virus”? Taek-seon is a translator who always feels tired, unmotivated and uninterested in romance. One day, Taek-seon has a disastrous blind date with Su-pil, a born single medical researcher who proposes on their first meeting. After the date they met, the world is suddenly enveloped in atmosphere of love... Taek-seon found herself laughing for no reason and searching for a beautiful dress, everything looks cute, even a daily promotional text from her old classmate Yeon-woo. However, Taek-seon knew that she had been infected with 100% fatality rate deadly virus -- Toxo Virus. She meets Dr. Lee Gyun, the only researcher who can create the antiviral medicine and she realizes that all these romantic feelings are symptoms of virus. Thus, her unexpected journey begins...

programme.title: The Sleep Curse
programme.desc: During Japan's wartime occupation of Hong Kong in 1941-1945, a young translator's collaboration with the enemy results in his life being cursed by a murdered 'comfort woman' forced to become a sex slave. Forty-five years later, the man's sins come back to haunt his son, a professor specializing in sleeping disorders, when the lady's ghost returns for vengeance.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E803 - The Winning Spirit
programme.desc: Afraid of failing her PE exam again, Lucy recruits the Morticians Club to help her pass.

programme.title: E610 - Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: E114 - Toads and Tiaras / Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it’ll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: E111 - Ha-Lay Lay-Lujah!
programme.desc: Sadie, Lay Lay, and the Alexander family go to church for their monthly visit. Sadie tries to show everyone she is ready to become a junior deacon. Lay Lay struggles with the guilt of eating Bryce's special ice cream and experiences strange glitches.

programme.title: E411 - Toon in for Danger
programme.desc: When Henry and Ray get a copy of the new Kid Danger and Captain Man cartoon and see that it's horrible, they must hurry to fix the cartoon before the big premiere party.

programme.title: E205 - The Other Mutanimals
programme.desc: Desperate to save Wingnut from Tokka, Rahzar, & the Monster Mutanimals, Donnie delves deeper into the lab of a mad scientist. Meanwhile, his brothers follow another Tokka to the Staten Island lab... only for things to take a disastrous turn!

programme.title: E206 - The Rejects
programme.desc: When Leo, Mikey, and Raph are captured by the mad scientist Jordan Perry and his Monster Mutanimals, Donnie must stop a mutant invasion on Staten Island and save everyone from the terrifying creation known as Mutant Omega!

programme.title: E258 - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E118 - That's So Cupid / Buddy Odour
programme.desc: Inspired by the latest Romcom release at the Movie Theatre, Best and Bester decide to go on a match-making mission. // Toot moves into the Sub with Best and Bester, but they find there's no getting away from her smell - literally!

programme.title: E109 - No Friend In Sight
programme.desc: Chloe feels smothered by Max and Phoebe, and encourages them to make new friends. However, the twins unwittingly make the same friend, and begin a battle for the ages over her. Chloe's new alone time is interrupted by living room-crashing pelican.

programme.title: E114 - Toads and Tiaras / Two Boys and a Baby
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it’ll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

programme.title: E212 - At Home, On the Lam
programme.desc: Bunny must punish Patrick for chocolate-flavored crimes.

programme.title: E258 - Boss for a Day / The Goofy Newbie
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. What could go wrong? // Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he finds out the employees get free ice cream.

programme.title: E111 - Musical Mayhem / Purrfect Punch
programme.desc: The Marsupilamis are great at making music, and when a music producer hears it Jade says it was her. // Lalou's cat adoption day doesn't go smoothly, when Punch is adopted by mistake.

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E305 - The Dirty Bubble Bass / Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the Dirty Bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance. // Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob (and the secret formula).

programme.title: E610 - Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: E410 - The Crew Builds A Farmyard Skatepark / The Crew Builds A Room With A View
programme.desc: When Farmer Zoe's animals get in the way of skate day, Rubble & Crew find a construction solution. // Hadley is in danger of losing his hotel to Speed Meister unless Rubble & Crew can save the hotel with their construction skills!

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum!

programme.title: E126 - The Seven Foods
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them.

programme.title: E237 - Rebecca Rabbit
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. It is a bit different to Peppa's house; it is inside a hill, with tunnels instead of stairs. They enjoy playing rabbits and everyone is surprised when George discovers he likes carrots!

programme.title: E235 - Grandpa's Little Train
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has built a fantastic little train called “Gertrude” and he takes Peppa and George for a ride. Along the way they meet their friends and they all hop aboard. Peppa and George think that “Gertrude” is the very best train in the whole world

programme.title: E236 - School Bus Trip
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes Peppa and her school friends on a school bus trip to the mountains. From the top of the mountains there is a fantastic view and Peppa and her friends have fun hearing echoes. After a great day out, the bus takes the children home

programme.title: E213 - Watch Out For Barbabright / If I Were A Billionaire
programme.desc: The twins visit Barbabright's room. // If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: E721 - Flying Robot Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher's robot sends Crusher and Pickle far-far away, it's up to Robot Blaze and Robot Sparkle to rescue them using coding!

programme.title: E410 - The Crew Builds A Farmyard Skatepark / The Crew Builds A Room With A View
programme.desc: When Farmer Zoe's animals get in the way of skate day, Rubble & Crew find a construction solution. // Hadley is in danger of losing his hotel to Speed Meister unless Rubble & Crew can save the hotel with their construction skills!

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E232 - Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: Le monde dans tous ses Etats
programme.desc: Un décryptage, en compagnie d'un(e) invité(e), de l'actualité politique et géopolitique d'un pays, à travers des reportages, des invités et des analyses des correspondants de france.tv et France 24.

programme.title: Le Paris des arts
programme.desc: Une balade culturelle dans Paris en compagnie d'un invité. Avec des sujets présentés des ponts d'un art à un autre, d'un artiste à l'autre, de la France au reste du monde.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Avec les équipes de France 24 et les grands reporters aux quatre coins du monde, une découverte des reportages long format sur des sujets d'actualité internationale.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Actuelles
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: À la découverte d'initiatives concrètes et innovantes dans les domaines de l'écologie, de l'économie circulaire, de la transition énergétique et de la consommation responsable, afin de mieux comprendre les solutions qui façonnent le monde de demain

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde
programme.desc: Un retour sur les meilleurs moments de la Coupe du monde de football, avec les plus beaux buts et les plus belles actions.

programme.title: Le décryptage[Live]
programme.desc: L'analyse approfondie d'un fait d'actualité qui revient sur un événement marquant ou une thématique complexe pour en expliquer les enjeux, les causes et les conséquences.

programme.title: Le décryptage[Live]
programme.desc: L'analyse approfondie d'un fait d'actualité qui revient sur un événement marquant ou une thématique complexe pour en expliquer les enjeux, les causes et les conséquences.

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde

programme.desc: The Olympique Lyonnais players are among the best having gone from victory to victory and won the French championship thirteen times. programme.desc: Fareed Zakaria brings viewers his insights and analysis, and interviews world leaders.

programme.title: E728
programme.desc: Seven years ago, we filmed an empty plot where award-winning musician Sona Jobarteh dreamed of building the country's first cultural academy.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: Shining a spotlight on Africa's most influential and inspiring talents through in-depth, authentic conversations. Hosted by Larry Madowo, this show is where Africa's brightest stars share their truths -- real, raw, and revealing.

programme.desc: Updates of the latest news from around the world.

programme.title: E260
programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: E382
programme.desc: Stay up to date with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner from CNN's immersive news hub.

programme.title: E128
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: Shining a spotlight on Africa's most influential and inspiring talents through in-depth, authentic conversations. Hosted by Larry Madowo, this show is where Africa's brightest stars share their truths -- real, raw, and revealing.

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: Shining a spotlight on Africa's most influential and inspiring talents through in-depth, authentic conversations. Hosted by Larry Madowo, this show is where Africa's brightest stars share their truths -- real, raw, and revealing.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E10 - The Pantanal
programme.desc: The Pantanal experiences extreme climatic shifts, from brutal droughts during the searingly hot dry season to floods created by rainy-season tempests. See how the region’s diverse animal population works to coexist and ensure collective survival.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Eat Or Be Eaten
programme.desc: Go up against predatory insects that are tailor-made for killing. See why the terrifying praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds, then go hunting in mid-air with deadly dragonflies.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E3 - Invisible Signals
programme.desc: Could undiscovered animal languages save some of our most endangered species? From subtle scents to colors that are invisible to the human eye, uncover the hidden ways creatures communicate, which scientists are only starting to understand.

programme.title: E10 - The Pantanal
programme.desc: The Pantanal experiences extreme climatic shifts, from brutal droughts during the searingly hot dry season to floods created by rainy-season tempests. See how the region’s diverse animal population works to coexist and ensure collective survival.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - Africa
programme.desc: Observe the eternal search for water that defines the lives of Africa’s wild animals. Witness the biggest marine feeding frenzy on Earth, see how cobras stock up on solar power, and join wildebeest herds and elephant clans on their epic migrations.

programme.title: E12 - Maison Des Canuts/Sarah Valente/Thibaut Thierry

programme.title: Inheritors

When Gumball and Darwin decide to think outside the box, their unusual gift is a big surprise, but not a good one.

programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: Yu-mi, a bestselling novelist, meets her new editor Soon-rok. With her Love Cell still asleep from heartbreak, his quiet charm stirs something new. Could he be her long awaited endgame?

Superstars Sunday: The Hand Of Death
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the center of Chinese martial arts and the cradle of anti-Manchu patriots in the 17th century. However, a Shaolin renegade Shih has defected to the Manchu and is leading a suppression of patriots trying to overthrow the Qing Dynasty. Tan Hsiung, a patriot, is arrested and killed by Shih. The Shaolin Abbot thus calls on his best student, Yun Fei to stop Shih from killing more people. Yun happens to find help from another anti-Manchu patriot, Tan, who is actually Tan Hsiung's younger brother. Along with help of Zorro, a master swordsman...

programme.title: The Adventurers
programme.desc: 20 years ago, in the region of Golden Triangle, Wah(aged about 9) and his parents, his god father (Keung) with his daughter (aged about 5) planned to smuggle some valuable items and information into Thailand. Wah's father, Keung and Leung were the closest of friends, just like blood brothers, all 3 of them were C.I.A. agents. Keung left for Thailand before the others to plan the operation. Leung ganged up with some bandits and forced Wah's father to surrender the confidential information. Wah, hidden in the dark, saw his parents being killed. 20 years later, Wah became an officer in the Thai Air Force. He couldn't take his mind off the revenge. Leung became a successful business man. He was in Thailand to launch a major business project. Ignoring Keung's advise, Wah and Roy slipped into Leung's hotel to try to assassinate him...

programme.title: The Hand Of Death
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the center of Chinese martial arts and the cradle of anti-Manchu patriots in the 17th century. However, a Shaolin renegade Shih has defected to the Manchu and is leading a suppression of patriots trying to overthrow the Qing Dynasty. Tan Hsiung, a patriot, is arrested and killed by Shih. The Shaolin Abbot thus calls on his best student, Yun Fei to stop Shih from killing more people. Yun happens to find help from another anti-Manchu patriot, Tan, who is actually Tan Hsiung's younger brother. Along with help of Zorro, a master swordsman...

programme.title: The Happenings
programme.desc: They are the generation who work hard at living it up at the discos, in midnight car races and occasional fight. They are not happy with the world they live in but are determined to make the most of it. They go racing down the freeway in a stolen car. When stopping at the petroleum station, they find they don't have money. On the spur of the moment, they decide to rob the station. After a fight, King Kong is badly hurt and Cream kills a staff by accident. Bee runs away from the group, badly shaken and frightened by this traumatic experience...

programme.title: You're My Favorite Song
programme.desc: Angel, a brilliant young girl, races to fulfill her dying grandfather's bucket list-starting with building a resort on their beachfront land. To succeed, she must outsmart powerful moguls trying to seize the property while enlisting her classmates' help to run the business in exchange for tutoring.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.
